expectedOutput: Replace with exact artifact or behavior expected.

workPlan.title: Confirm scope, context, acceptance criteria, and verify gate before editing.
Run explicit review lenses against the diff and verify evidence.

orchestration.reason: Task starts in solo-first mode; use bounded subagents only for independent scout, planning, or review work.

modelRoles.planner: Use the strongest available model for decomposition, architecture, risk, and acceptance criteria.
modelRoles.worker: Use the fastest reliable model for a bounded, already-planned single write set.
modelRoles.reviewer: Use a model or thinking setting decorrelated from the worker when review quality matters.
modelRoles.watchdog: Use a strong model only for final risk review, security, release, or high-impact changes.
